'''âs-f-zh''' ('''kasafazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cag|cag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cag|cag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-f-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kasafazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafazh|thisafazh]] || [[word:jisafazh|jisafazh]] || [[word:shisafazh|shisafazh]] || [[word:kisafazh|kisafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusafazh|thuthusafazh]] || [[word:jujusafazh|jujusafazh]] || [[word:shushusafazh|shushusafazh]] || [[word:kukusafazh|kukusafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusafazh|thusafazh]] || [[word:jusafazh|jusafazh]] || [[word:shusafazh|shusafazh]] || [[word:kusafazh|kusafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusafazh|thusafazh]] || [[word:jusafazh|jusafazh]] || [[word:shusafazh|shusafazh]] || [[word:kusafazh|kusafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesafazh|thesafazh]] || [[word:jesafazh|jesafazh]] || [[word:shesafazh|shesafazh]] || [[word:kesafazh|kesafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosafazh|thothosafazh]] || [[word:jojosafazh|jojosafazh]] || [[word:shoshosafazh|shoshosafazh]] || [[word:kokosafazh|kokosafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosafazh|thosafazh]] || [[word:josafazh|josafazh]] || [[word:shosafazh|shosafazh]] || [[word:kosafazh|kosafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosafazh|thosafazh]] || [[word:josafazh|josafazh]] || [[word:shosafazh|shosafazh]] || [[word:kosafazh|kosafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsafazh|thĂŠsafazh]] || [[word:jĂŠsafazh|jĂŠsafazh]] || [[word:shĂŠsafazh|shĂŠsafazh]] || [[word:kĂŠsafazh|kĂŠsafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasafazh|thathasafazh]] || [[word:jajasafazh|jajasafazh]] || [[word:shashasafazh|shashasafazh]] || [[word:kakasafazh|kakasafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasafazh|thasafazh]] || [[word:jasafazh|jasafazh]] || [[word:shasafazh|shasafazh]] || [[word:kasafazh|kasafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasafazh|thasafazh]] || [[word:jasafazh|jasafazh]] || [[word:shasafazh|shasafazh]] || [[word:kasafazh|kasafazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasafazh|shasafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasafazh|goshasafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasafazh|gokishasafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasafazhnĂŒ|shasafazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasafazhnknĂŒ|goshasafazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafazhnĂŒ|gokishasafazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasafazhshĂ«|shasafazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkshĂ«|goshasafazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasafazhshĂ«|gokishasafazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafazhro|shasafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkro|goshasafazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafazhro|gokishasafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafazhmu|shasafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkmu|goshasafazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafazhmu|gokishasafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasafazhsher|shasafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasafazhnksher|goshasafazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasafazhsher|gokishasafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasafazhng|shasafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkng|goshasafazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasafazhng|gokishasafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasafazhya|shasafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkya|goshasafazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasafazhya|gokishasafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasafazhyam|shasafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkyam|goshasafazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasafazhyam|gokishasafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafazhnĂŒshĂ«|shasafazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasafazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasafazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafazhnĂŒro|shasafazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafazhnknĂŒro|goshasafazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafazhnĂŒro|gokishasafazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafazhnĂŒmu|shasafazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafazhnknĂŒmu|goshasafazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafazhnĂŒmu|gokishasafazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shasafazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasafazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasafazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafazhshĂ«ro|shasafazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkshĂ«ro|goshasafazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafazhshĂ«ro|gokishasafazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafazhshĂ«mu|shasafazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkshĂ«mu|goshasafazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafazhshĂ«mu|gokishasafazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafazhronĂŒ|shasafazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkronĂŒ|goshasafazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafazhronĂŒ|gokishasafazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafazhroshĂ«|shasafazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkroshĂ«|goshasafazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafazhroshĂ«|gokishasafazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafazhromu|shasafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkromu|goshasafazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafazhromu|gokishasafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafazhmunĂŒ|shasafazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkmunĂŒ|goshasafazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafazhmunĂŒ|gokishasafazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafazhmushĂ«|shasafazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkmushĂ«|goshasafazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafazhmushĂ«|gokishasafazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafazhmuro|shasafazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafazhnkmuro|goshasafazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafazhmuro|gokishasafazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
